visual: Stands feet shoulder-width, arms rise slowly to shoulder height then press down to waist — the opening posture of the form.
motion_description: From a stationary stance with feet shoulder-width apart and knees softly bent, the person slowly raises both arms straight forward to shoulder height, keeping the palms facing down. Once at shoulder level, the elbows bend slightly to draw the hands gently back before pressing them steadily down to waist level in a continuous flow. The weight remains evenly distributed between both legs, and the torso stays facing directly forward without any rotation throughout the movement.
